summary: Iteration 55: ID Verification and Item Modifier Extras Pricing - All requested features tested and working. Fixed 1 bug in table.py (modifiers not returned in table detail endpoint).
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created: Table #5 (Test_ID_Verify), TAP Tab #114 (Tap_Age_Test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ID verification and extras pricing fully working. Backend modifiers field now returned in table detail endpoint. TAP age verification modal uses data-testid='age-verify-modal'. TABLE ID verification modal uses data-testid='id-verification-modal'. Item customize modal uses data-testid='customize-modal' with extras fields having prices.

TABLE_ID_Verification.open_available_table: PASS - Open table form works (guest name, server, seats)
TABLE_ID_Verification.id_verify_modal_appears: PASS - Modal appears when clicking alcohol item
TABLE_ID_Verification.checkbox_enables_confirm: PASS - Confirm button enabled after checking checkbox
TABLE_ID_Verification.item_added_after_verify: PASS - Alcohol item added to order after ID verification
TABLE_ID_Verification.id_verified_badge_shown: PASS - Green 'ID verified' badge appears in session
TABLE_ID_Verification.subsequent_alcohol_adds_directly: PASS - After verify, no modal for next alcohol items

TAP_Age_Verification.modal_appears_for_alcohol: PASS - Age Verification modal appears for Cocktails
TAP_Age_Verification.confirm_21_adds_item: PASS - Clicking 'Confirm 21+' adds item to order

Item_Customize_Modal.extras_with_pricing: PASS - Can add extras with name AND price
Item_Customize_Modal.price_shown_next_to_extra: PASS - Price shows in modal (+$2.50 format)

Order_Display.extras_show_with_price_TAP: PASS - TapPage shows extras format: '+ name (+$price)'
Order_Display.extras_show_with_price_TABLE: PASS - TablePage shows extras with prices (after fix)

bug_fixed.issue: get_table_detail endpoint (line 202-218) was not returning modifiers field for items
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'modifiers, catalog_item_id' to SELECT query and included in response dict with _parse_meta()
